PropertyHolder.h
1 // -*- tab-width: 2; indent-tabs-mode: nil; coding: utf-8-with-signature -*-
2 //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

6 //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
7 #ifndef PROPERTYHOLDER_H_
8 #define PROPERTYHOLDER_H_
9 
10 #include <map>
11 #include <arcane/utils/String.h>
12 #include <arcane/utils/ITraceMng.h>
13 
25 template<class Property,class ValueType>
26 class PropertyHolder
27 {
28 private:
29 
30  template<class T>
31  bool _PrintableValue() const
32  {
33  return true;
34  }
35 #ifndef WIN32
36  template<class T*>
37  bool _PrintableValue() const
38  {
39  return false;
40  }
41 #endif
42 
43 public:
44 
45  PropertyHolder(Arcane::String name="Undefined")
46  : m_name(name)
47  {};
48 
49  virtual ~PropertyHolder(){};
50 
51  typedef typename Property::eProperty PropertyType ;
52  typedef std::map<PropertyType,ValueType> PropertyList ;
53  typedef typename PropertyList::iterator PropertyListIter ;
54  typedef typename PropertyList::const_iterator PropertyListConstIter ;
55 
57  bool hasProperty(PropertyType property) const
58  {
59  return (m_properties.find(property)!=m_properties.end()) ;
60  }
61 
63  ValueType getProperty(PropertyType property,
64  ValueType default_value) const
65  {
66  PropertyListConstIter iter = m_properties.find(property) ;
67  if(iter!=m_properties.end())
68  return (*iter).second ;
69  else
70  return default_value ;
71  }
72 
74  ValueType getProperty(PropertyType property,
75  bool* hasProperty,
76  ValueType default_value) const
77  {
78  PropertyListConstIter iter = m_properties.find(property) ;
79  if(iter!=m_properties.end())
80  {
81  *hasProperty = true ;
82  return (*iter).second ;
83  }
84  else
85  {
86  *hasProperty = false ;
87  return default_value ;
88  }
89  }
90 
91  ValueType getProperty(PropertyType property,
92  bool* hasProperty) const
93  {
94  PropertyListConstIter iter = m_properties.find(property) ;
95  if(iter!=m_properties.end())
96  {
97  *hasProperty = true ;
98  return (*iter).second ;
99  }
100  else
101  {
102  *hasProperty = false ;
103  return m_default_value ;
104  }
105  }
106 
108  Arcane::String getName() const { return m_name ; }
109 
111  void setName(Arcane::String name) { m_name = name ; }
112 
114  void setProperty(PropertyType property, ValueType val)
115  {
116  m_properties[property] = val ;
117  }
118 
120  void setDefaultValue(ValueType val) { m_default_value = val ; }
121 
123  void printInfo(Arcane::ITraceMng * trace_mng) const
124  {
125  ARCANE_ASSERT((trace_mng),("Trace manager pointer null"));
126 
127  for(PropertyListConstIter iProperty=m_properties.begin(); iProperty!=m_properties.end(); ++iProperty)
128  {
129  PropertyType property_type = iProperty->first;
130 
131  if(_PrintableValue<ValueType>())
132  {
133  trace_mng->info() << " * Property name : " << Property::name(property_type)
134  << ", value = " << iProperty->second;
135  }
136  else
137  {
138  trace_mng->info() << " * Property name : " << Property::name(property_type)
139  << ", value type not printable";
140  }
141  }
142  }
143 
144 private :
145 
147  Arcane::String m_name ;
148 
150  ValueType m_default_value ;
151 
153  PropertyList m_properties ;
154 };
155 
156 #endif /*PROPERTYHOLDER_H_*/
PropertyHolder

ValueType getProperty(PropertyType property, ValueType default_value) const
return the value of one property, defaultValue if the property does not exist

ValueType getProperty(PropertyType property, bool *hasProperty, ValueType default_value) const
return the value of one property and set if the property exists

void setDefaultValue(ValueType val)
set the defaultValue to return when one property does not exist
